# The Stronger Life — Full Site Guide

> Christian premarital counseling, marriage coaching, and wedding officiant services in St. Cloud, Minnesota. Matt Reeve — licensed premarital counselor, Prepare/Enrich certified, certified relationship coach, ordained minister, 32+ years experience.

This document provides expanded context about The Stronger Life for language models. For a concise overview, see [llms.txt](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/llms.txt).

## About the Business

**Name:** The Stronger Life  
**Tagline:** Strengthening Marriages Before They Begin  
**Owner / Practitioner:** Matt Reeve  
**Location:** St. Cloud, Minnesota (Central Minnesota)  
**Website:** https://thestrongerlifemn.org  
**Locale:** en_US

Matt Reeve has served as a licensed premarital counselor, certified relationship coach, and ordained minister for over 32 years. He lives in Central Minnesota with his wife of 34+ years. He has two grown daughters and three grandchildren.

**Philosophy:** The goal is not just to get couples married — it is to help them build a foundation for a marriage that lasts and thrives. Matt starts every relationship with a free, no-obligation consultation so couples can determine if they are a good fit. He tailors his approach to each couple's values, goals, and circumstances rather than using a one-size-fits-all method.

**Faith approach:** Matt's foundation is rooted in the Christian faith and biblical marriage. He warmly serves couples from all backgrounds — including non-religious, interfaith, and spiritually diverse couples — tailoring sessions to each couple's values and story.

## Services & Pricing

### Premarital Counseling

- **URL:** https://thestrongerlifemn.org/premarital-counseling
- **Standalone price:** $600 (5–6 sessions)
- **Bundled with wedding officiant:** $400
- **Prepare/Enrich assessment fee:** $35 (one-time)
- **Session length:** 1.5–2 hours each
- **Scheduling:** Weekly, biweekly, or monthly
- **Format:** In-person (St. Cloud area) or virtual via Google Meet (nationwide)
- **Recommended start:** 4–8 months before wedding date

**Includes:**
- Customized Prepare/Enrich relationship assessment (12 key relationship areas)
- 5–6 personalized counseling sessions
- Communication and conflict resolution tools
- Take-home resources
- 1 free post-marital session within 1 year of wedding
- Eligibility for discounted Minnesota marriage license (program exceeds 12-hour MN requirement)

**Key distinction:** Premarital counseling is educational and forward-looking for healthy couples preparing for marriage. It is not clinical therapy; referrals to licensed therapists are available when deeper therapeutic work is needed.

### Wedding Officiant

- **URL:** https://thestrongerlifemn.org/wedding-officiant
- **Service area:** St. Cloud, Central Minnesota, Twin Cities metro (travel fee may apply beyond 30 miles)

| Package | Price | Summary |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Custom Ceremony | Starting at $750 | Face-to-face planning, fully customized script, unlimited revisions, rehearsal coordination, early arrival and vendor coordination, legal filing |
| Personalized Ceremony | Starting at $600 | Phone consultation, professionally written ceremony with minor customization, legal filing |
| Simple & Intimate | Starting at $500 | 15-minute ceremony to legalize union, legal filing |

**Also available:** Vow renewals, house blessings, commitment ceremonies, memorial services.

**Notes:** Additional fees may apply for travel beyond 30 miles and weddings on major holidays (Valentine's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving, New Year's Eve). Couples may write their own vows; Matt encourages personalization.

### Marriage & Relationship Coaching

- **URL:** https://thestrongerlifemn.org/marriage-coaching
- **Session length:** 1–2 hours
- **Frequency:** Weekly or biweekly
- **Format:** In-person (St. Cloud area) or virtual nationwide

| Package | Price | Summary |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Single Session | $150 | One coaching session for couples or individuals |
| 4-Session Package | $525 | Save $75 vs. single sessions |
| Marriage Coaching Program | $600 | Relationship assessment plus 4–6 personalized sessions |

**Formats offered:** In-person couples coaching, individual coaching, phone/virtual sessions, family relationship coaching.

**Key distinction:** Marriage coaching is forward-focused and goal-oriented — it builds skills and strengthens relationships proactively. It does not diagnose or treat mental health conditions (that is the role of clinical counseling/therapy).

**Cancellation policy:** 24-hour notice required to avoid charges. Unused package sessions can be applied to future dates.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/): Hero value proposition, service cards, about/trust section, featured testimonials, FAQ, music player with original songs by Matt Reeve, CTA to book consultation.
- [Services & Pricing](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/services): Full pricing overview for all services with links to detail pages.
- [About Matt Reeve](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/about): Bio, approach, credentials, and personal background.
- [Contact / Book Consultation](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/contact): Contact form; response within 24 hours. Free 30-minute consultation booking.
- [Testimonials](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/testimonials): 26+ five-star client reviews and ceremony photo gallery.
- [Blog](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/blog): "Before and After You Say 'I Do'" — articles on communication, conflict resolution, wedding planning, and marriage growth. Individual posts at `/blog/[slug]`. Content sourced from Sanity CMS.

## Credentials & Experience

- Licensed Premarital Counselor
- Certified Relationship Coach
- Ordained Minister — 32+ years
- Prepare/Enrich certified facilitator
- Trained in family dynamics, pastoral counseling, and professional ethics
- Hundreds of couples counseled and ceremonies performed

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do I need to be Christian to work with Matt?**  
No. Matt serves couples from all backgrounds while remaining rooted in his Christian faith.

**How do I get started?**  
Book a free 30-minute consultation via the contact page or call (952) 393-8826.

**Are virtual sessions available?**  
Yes, for all services — premarital counseling, marriage coaching, and ceremony planning.

**Do both partners attend premarital counseling?**  
Yes, both partners attend every session together for best results.

**Is premarital counseling required in Minnesota?**  
Not legally required, but completing 12+ hours qualifies couples for a reduced marriage license fee. The Stronger Life program exceeds this requirement.

## Contact

- **Email:** thestrongerlife@gmail.com
- **Phone:** (952) 393-8826
- **Location:** St. Cloud, Minnesota
- **Consultation:** Free 30-minute meeting, in person or virtual, no obligation
